title: Architect for the Libuv Thread Pool (UV_THREADPOOL_SIZE)
description: Explain the purpose and function of the Libuv Thread Pool in Node.js. Manage the execution of CPU-intensive operations (FS, Crypto, DNS) on the thread pool. Architect applications to avoid blocking the main Event Loop through proper thread pool utilization.
objectives: Explain the purpose and function of the Libuv Thread Pool in Node.js.
Manage the execution of CPU-intensive operations (FS, Crypto, DNS) on the thread pool.
Architect applications to avoid blocking the main Event Loop through proper thread pool utilization.
